name: osp_marketing_tools
description: A comprehensive suite of tools for technical marketing content creation, optimization, and product positioning based on Open Strategy Partners' proven methodologies. This software is based on the Model Context Protocol (MCP) and is usable by any LLM client that supports MCP.

tools.name: health_check
tools.description: Check if the server is running and can access its resources.

tools.name: get_editing_codes
tools.description: Get the Open Strategy Partners (OSP) editing codes documentation and usage protocol for editing texts.

tools.name: get_writing_guide
tools.description: Get the Open Strategy Partners (OSP) writing guide and usage protocol for editing texts.

tools.name: get_meta_guide
tools.description: Get the Open Strategy Partners (OSP) Web Content Meta Information Generation System (titles, meta-titles, slugs).

tools.name: get_value_map_positioning_guide
tools.description: Get the Open Strategy Partners (OSP) Product Communications Value Map Generation System for Product Positioning (value cases, feature extraction, taglines).

tools.name: get_on_page_seo_guide
tools.description: Get the Open Strategy Partners (OSP) On-Page SEO Optimization Guide.

resources.name: osp://marketing-tools
resources.description: Resource namespace for OSP marketing tools.
